[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_prepare_state.py","old_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "",
    parent_branch: str = "",
    trunk_branch: str = "",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    plan_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = None,
    pr_url: str | None = None,
    was_created: bool = False,
    base_branch: str | None = None,
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: None = None,
    title: str | None = None,
    body: str | None = None,
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        plan_id=plan_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body="",
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )","new_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "",
    parent_branch: str = "",
    trunk_branch: str = "",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    pr_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = None,
    pr_url: str | None = None,
    was_created: bool = False,
    base_branch: str | None = None,
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: None = None,
    title: str | None = None,
    body: str | None = None,
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        pr_id=pr_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body="",
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )"}

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_finalize_pr.py","old_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    parent_branch: str = "main",
    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    skip_description: bool = False,
    plan_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = 42,
    pr_url: str | None = "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    was_created: bool = True,
    base_branch: str | None = "main",
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: PlanContext | None = None,
    title: str | None = "My PR Title",
    body: str | None = "My PR body",
    existing_pr_body: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=skip_description,
        quiet=False,
        plan_id=plan_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )","new_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    parent_branch: str = "main",
    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    skip_description: bool = False,
    pr_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = 42,
    pr_url: str | None = "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    was_created: bool = True,
    base_branch: str | None = "main",
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: PlanContext | None = None,
    title: str | None = "My PR Title",
    body: str | None = "My PR body",
    existing_pr_body: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=skip_description,
        quiet=False,
        pr_id=pr_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )"}

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py","old_string":"def test_plan_impl_auto_forces_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Plan impl branch (plan_id set) auto-forces when behind remote; no error returned."""
    pr = _pr_details(number=42, branch="feature")
    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
    fake_github = FakeLocalGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    fake_git = FakeGit(
        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
        remote_refs={("origin", "feature"): "remote_sha_abc"},
        branch_heads={"feature": "local_sha_xyz"},
        branch_divergence={
            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=3, behind=2)
        },
    )
    global_config = GlobalConfig(
        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
        use_graphite=True,
        shell_setup_complete=False,
        github_planning=True,
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(
        git=fake_git,
        graphite=fake_graphite,
        github=fake_github,
        cwd=tmp_path,
        global_config=global_config,
    )
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, plan_id="7699")","new_string":"def test_plan_impl_auto_forces_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Plan impl branch (pr_id set) auto-forces when behind remote; no error returned."""
    pr = _pr_details(number=42, branch="feature")
    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
    fake_github = FakeLocalGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    fake_git = FakeGit(
        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
        remote_refs={("origin", "feature"): "remote_sha_abc"},
        branch_heads={"feature": "local_sha_xyz"},
        branch_divergence={
            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=3, behind=2)
        },
    )
    global_config = GlobalConfig(
        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
        use_graphite=True,
        shell_setup_complete=False,
        github_planning=True,
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(
        git=fake_git,
        graphite=fake_graphite,
        github=fake_github,
        cwd=tmp_path,
        global_config=global_config,
    )
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, pr_id="7699")"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py","old_string":"def test_non_plan_branch_errors_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Non-plan branch (no plan_id) still errors when behind remote."""
    fake_git = FakeGit(
        remote_refs={("origin", "feature"): "remote_sha_abc"},
        branch_heads={"feature": "local_sha_xyz"},
        branch_divergence={
            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=1, behind=3)
        },
    )
    global_config = GlobalConfig(
        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
        use_graphite=True,
        shell_setup_complete=False,
        github_planning=True,
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(
        git=fake_git,
        cwd=tmp_path,
        global_config=global_config,
    )
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, plan_id=None)","new_string":"def test_non_plan_branch_errors_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Non-plan branch (no pr_id) still errors when behind remote."""
    fake_git = FakeGit(
        remote_refs={("origin", "feature"): "remote_sha_abc"},
        branch_heads={"feature": "local_sha_xyz"},
        branch_divergence={
            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=1, behind=3)
        },
    )
    global_config = GlobalConfig(
        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
        use_graphite=True,
        shell_setup_complete=False,
        github_planning=True,
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(
        git=fake_git,
        cwd=tmp_path,
        global_config=global_config,
    )
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, pr_id=None)"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/core/test_plan_context_provider.py","old_string":"def test_plan_context_dataclass_frozen() -> None:
    """Test that PlanContext is immutable (frozen dataclass)."""
    context = PlanContext(
        plan_id="123",
        plan_content="Plan content",
        objective_summary="Objective #1: Test",
    )

    assert context.plan_id == "123"
    assert context.plan_content == "Plan content"
    assert context.objective_summary == "Objective #1: Test"

    try:
        context.plan_id = "456"  # type: ignore[misc]
        raise AssertionError("Expected FrozenInstanceError")
    except AttributeError:
        pass","new_string":"def test_plan_context_dataclass_frozen() -> None:
    """Test that PlanContext is immutable (frozen dataclass)."""
    context = PlanContext(
        pr_id="123",
        plan_content="Plan content",
        objective_summary="Objective #1: Test",
    )

    assert context.pr_id == "123"
    assert context.plan_content == "Plan content"
    assert context.objective_summary == "Objective #1: Test"

    try:
        context.pr_id = "456"  # type: ignore[misc]
        raise AssertionError("Expected FrozenInstanceError")
    except AttributeError:
        pass"}

session.assistant: The remaining `plan_id` occurrences are: - Line 107 in test_link_pr_to_objective_nodes.py — `save_plan_ref(plan_id=)` erk_shared API, correct to stay - Lines 118, 195 in test_prepare_state.py — dict keys `"plan_id": "99"` and `"plan_id": "55"` — these are JSON content for plan-ref.json files, not SubmitState kwargs. They should stay as-is (they're the on-disk format). - Lines 170-171, 186-187 in test_prepare_state.py — test function names/docstrings mentioning `plan_id`. The function names and docstrings reference the field name. The plan says not to rename test-only changes beyond CI green (node 4.1), but these doc strings would be misleading. However, lines 170/186 are function names and 171/187 are docstrings — they should probably reference `pr_id` for clarity. But actually, these are test function names that shouldn't be changed (they describe test intent, not field names). The docstrings mention `plan_id=None` but the actual assertion already says `result.pr_id is None`. Let me leave the test names/docstrings alone — they're just string descriptions and don't affect CI. The dict keys like `"plan_id": "55"` are on-disk JSON format from erk_shared, correctly left as-is.

lint: -- prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore
